description: Final-shape manifest template for future human-recorded vocal calibration rounds. Prefer generating this shape from human_rating_cases.template.json plus human_rating_sheet.template.csv unless you intentionally need a manual fallback.

cases.description: Example case for a human-recorded guide/take pair plus note-level human rating consensus.

human_ratings.notes: Consensus: slight overshoot on attack, settled by sustain.
